display: table-cell; white-space: nowrap; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center;
display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
CI tracks input-token count per build
Fail build if token count exceeds baseline + 20%
1800 tokens @ 1M req/month = $27/month vs $7.50 (3.6× creep, silent)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
(prompt_v2, model_old) vs (prompt_v2, model_new)
score diverges > noise floor → re-tune before upgrading
Model upgrade without model-pair eval = untested deploy
GATE 2 — Eval-in-CI (on every PR touching a prompt layer)

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
run eval → compare to baseline
score drops > threshold → merge blocked
PR smoke: 20–50 rows, minutes
Release: 200–500 rows, ~30 min
Weekly deep: 1000+ rows

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p:
Before: freeform text → 12% parse failure rate
After: JSON mode + Zod schema → ~0% parse failure rate
Schema: { priority: P0|P1|P2|P3, summary: string }
Still needed: content tests (schema ≠ correctness)
What 'The Prompt' Actually Is — all five layers change behaviour

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: SYSTEM PROMPT (tone, role, safety rules) ← most-versioned

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: FEW-SHOT EXAMPLES (format + style anchors) ← often unversioned

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: MESSAGE TEMPLATE (slots for dynamic content) ← often unversioned

div.style: display: table; white-space: break-spaces; line-height: 1.5; max-width: 200px; text-align: center; width: 200px;

span.p: TOOL / FUNCTION SCHEMAS (JSON shape contract) ← rarely versioned
